title: sedum rosea var. integrifolium
intro: Sedum rosea var. integrifolium, also known as Rose Sedum or Live Forever, is a succulent plant species in the family Crassulaceae, characterized by its thick, fleshy leaves and stems. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Sedum rosea var. integrifolium have been reported to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, such as skin conditions and respiratory issues.
